title: Davin Kotras
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Davinkotra.jpg]] |name=Davin Kotras |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Gray |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Care to introduce your friend, Jolee?''"
"''What, are you deaf? His name's Davin. Old friend from my wanderer days.|[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Jolee Bindo]]|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''}} '''Davin Kotras''' was a smuggler and pilot before and during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a good friend of [[Jolee Bindo]], [[Sunry]], and [[Elora]], and had shared many adventures with Bindo during his adventuring days. During the [[Jedi Civil War]], Davin came across Jolee once again and told him of the predicament of another friend of theirs, a war veteran named [[Sunry]], who had been arrested for murder on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Davin Kotras |fi=Davin Kotras |pl=Davin Kotras }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kotras, Davin}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
